title: [BUG] Cannot add property numFmt, object is not extensible
author: rizkiandrianto

comments.author: tabzhao
comments.body: same problem me too, Lib version: 4.2.1

comments.author: Manuele19
comments.body:
I finally found the problem!
When inserting new rows with 'i' or 'o' style it automatically call the Object.preventExtensions() function.

You have to insert rows with the style 'n' to add your custom style
